description: Adapter mapping for the Llama model family. Covers Llama-2, Llama-3, Mistral, and CodeLlama, which share the same HuggingFace module structure (LlamaForCausalLM / MistralForCausalLM). Mistral uses the same module paths as Llama in HuggingFace transformers; the only differences are config values (sliding window, num_kv_heads), not module structure.

parameterized_indices.{i}: Layer index (0-based). Expands to all layers in the model (0..num_layers-1).

virtual_probes.capture_strategy: Captured from attention computation output. Requires attn_implementation='eager' (SDPA) or LSE reconstruction for FlashAttention. Not a hookable nn.Module.
Captured as the input tensor to the transformer block (pre-hook on model.layers.{i}).
Captured as the hidden states after attention output is added to the residual stream, before MLP. Computed from the attention output hook and the block input.
Captured as the output tensor of the transformer block (post-hook on model.layers.{i}).

notes: Mistral and CodeLlama use identical module paths to Llama in HuggingFace transformers. The only differences are in config (sliding_window, num_key_value_heads, rope_theta, etc.), not module structure.
The rotary embedding module (model.layers.{i}.self_attn.rotary_emb) is intentionally unmapped. It will receive a fallback _raw name if encountered.
model.layers.{i} itself is not mapped to a canonical name — it is the parent container. Virtual probes (residual_pre, residual_mid, residual_post) attach to it via pre/post hooks.
